title: Vietnamese-Style Grilled Pork with Nectarine Salsa
description: A sweet and savory combination of grilled pork and fresh nectarine salsa, inspired by the flavors of Vietnam.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together brown sugar, fish sauce, rice vinegar, ginger, salt, and black pepper.
Add the marinade to the pork shoulder and let it sit for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Grill the pork shoulder for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Let the pork rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
In a separate bowl, combine diced nectarines, red onion, and chopped cilantro.
Season the nectarine salsa with salt to taste.
Serve the grilled pork with the nectarine salsa on the side.
